center.name: 普里比洛夫群岛
center.summary: 普里比洛夫群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Red-legged kittiwake、虎头海雕，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in the Pribilof Islands, Bogoslof Island, and Buldir Island in the Bering Sea off the coast of Alaska, and the Commander Islands, Russia, and spends the winter at sea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |bibcode=2003Ibis..145..318M }} but vagrant eagles have been found in North America at locations including the Aleutian Islands, Pribilof Islands, and Kodiak Island, as well as a single individual seen in Texas, Nova Scotia, Massachusetts, Maine, and Newfoundland,{{Cite web |last= |date=2021-12-31 |title=About that Steller's Sea Eagle
